description: The day that has passed, held in memory. It represents not just the previous calendar day but the accumulated wisdom of recent experience, the foundation on which today stands.
rationale: The word 'rao' begins with the flowing 'r', suggesting the river of time that has passed. The vowel hiatus 'a-o' moves from open memory ('a') to contained wholeness ('o'), representing how yesterday's experiences become integrated wisdom. The CV.V structure maintains consistency with other temporal markers.
